title: SV: comment inside macro leads to syntax error
body:
I believe comments inside a fancy text macro with arguments (that expands to multiple lines) is a vague area in LRM. However, the UVM library uses this "feature" and Icarus gives a compile error. Below is a reduced test.

Thanks
Srini

Line 3 below, i.e. 2nd line inside the macro leads to a compile error.

```verilog
`define uvm_field_utils_end \
     if(what__ inside {UVM_SETINT,UVM_SETSTR,UVM_SETOBJ}) begin \
        // remove all scopes recorded (through super and other objects visited before) \
          __current_scopes.pop_back()); \
        __m_uvm_status_container.m_uvm_cycle_scopes = __current_scopes; \
     end \

module m;
endmodule : m

```
code_blocks:
`define uvm_field_utils_end \
     if(what__ inside {UVM_SETINT,UVM_SETSTR,UVM_SETOBJ}) begin \
        // remove all scopes recorded (through super and other objects visited before) \
          __current_scopes.pop_back()); \
        __m_uvm_status_container.m_uvm_cycle_scopes = __current_scopes; \
     end \

module m;
endmodule : m
